---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Motivation
Explain why this feature is useful and what problem it solves.

## Proposed solution
Describe your suggested implementation and any alternatives you considered.

## Additional context
Optionally add screenshots, mockups, or other context.
